_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to solve simple exponential equations.

_source.w: We are learning to solve simple exponential equations.
y: Exponential equations model growth and decay processes — from compound interest and population growth to radioactive decay and drug metabolism.
Solving exponential equations using same-base strategies develops our understanding of exponential relationships.
These skills are prerequisite for logarithms and the analysis of exponential models in VCE Mathematics.
eg: Solving by trial and improvement when the base cannot be matched easily.
Connecting to a real problem: 'An investment doubles every 7 years. After how many years is it 8 times the original?'
Using technology to solve exponential equations graphically.
